cases.prompt_body: Three-quarter close view of an unlabeled Therac-25 treatment head, off-white housing and visible beam aperture clearly readable, one tiny ready-state indicator suggests X-ray-safe configuration while the aperture physically exposes a bare target-filter seat, no emitted beam, pale beige clinical wall, charcoal cable shadow, restrained fluorescent light

styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents
styles.positive_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension, Three-quarter close view of an unlabeled Therac-25 treatment head, off-white housing and visible beam aperture clearly readable, one tiny ready-state indicator suggests X-ray-safe configuration while the aperture physically exposes a bare target-filter seat, no emitted beam, pale beige clinical wall, charcoal cable shadow, restrained fluorescent light
